name: Exosister Nunctis
desc:
2 Rank 4 "Exosister" Xyz Monsters
Must be Xyz Summoned with the above materials. The first time a card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect each turn, it is not destroyed.
Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; return 1 card your opponent controls or in their GY to the hand.
(Quick Effect): You can return this card and all Xyz Monsters from your GY into Extra Deck; set 1 "Exosister" Trap from your Deck. It can be activated this turn.
